---
title: "a08final"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
set.seed(22)

n_simulations <- 5000

num_blocks <- 7 
num_treatments <- 8 

tau_variance <- 0.8

RCBD_simulation <- function(){
  treatments <- rep(1:num_treatments, times = num_blocks)
  blocks <- rep(1:num_blocks, each = num_treatments)

  tau_raw <- c(1,2,6,3,8,9,-10,5)
  tau_centered <- tau_raw - mean(tau_raw)
  tau_scaled <- tau_centered*sqrt(tau_variance/mean(tau_centered^2))
  
  mu <- 0
  beta <- rep(rnorm(num_blocks, mean = 0, sd = 1), each = num_treatments)
  sigma <- rnorm(num_treatments*num_blocks, mean = 0, sd = 1)
  
  y <- mu + tau_scaled[treatments]+beta+sigma
  
  sim_data <- data.frame(
    y = y,
    treatment = as.factor(treatments),
    block = as.factor(blocks)
  )
  
  model <- aov(y~treatment+block, data = sim_data)
  p_value <- summary(model)[[1]]["treatment", "Pr(>F)"]
  return(p_value)
}

results <- replicate(n_simulations, RCBD_simulation())
results_df <- data.frame(p_value = results)

head(results_df)
summary(results_df)
cat("Significant Results", sum(results_df$p_value<0.05), "\n")
cat("Estimated Power", mean(results_df$p_value<0.05), "\n")

```
